markets.prompt: Will Brandon Aiyuk be traded before the 2026 League Year?
markets.details: Resolves YES if Brandon Aiyuk is officially traded from the San Francisco 49ers to another NFL team before the start of the 2026 NFL League Year (typically mid-March 2026).

markets.prompt: Will Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo finalize their divorce by August 1, 2026?
markets.details: Resolves YES if Jelly Roll (Jason DeFord) and Bunnie Xo (Jelly Roll's wife) have their divorce finalized by a court on or before August 1, 2026. Resolves NO otherwise.
